expectations.evidence: The script creates its own mock AgUiSdk::UserMessage class, not the actual SDK type
Uses custom mock classes AgUiSdk::TextInputContent and AgUiSdk::BinaryInputContent

expectations.text: Initializes UserMessage with content as an array of TextInputContent and BinaryInputContent
Uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Types::RunAgentInput with thread_id, run_id, state, messages, tools, context, forwarded_props
expectations.evidence: Uses custom AgUiSdk::RunAgentInput with different fields (agent_id, session_id, streaming), not the SDK type
